# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: PASS

**Test:** CSRF: browser token rotates after login
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:36.838Z
**OWASP Category:** API8:2023 - Security Misconfiguration

## Description

CSRF token rotated after login (or no initial token was exposed before authentication).

## Why this result

Passed because CSRF token rotated after login (or no initial token was exposed before authentication).
